title: Profiling, Allocator Performance, and Hardening · Memory Retrieval
summary: After a delay, a release reviewer reconstructs the measured allocator optimization report contract from partial traces, compares two near-miss implementations, and retrieves prior bounds and lifetime rules before feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for measured allocator optimization report after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Measure allocation rate, size distribution, lifetime, peak live bytes, failures, and call sites with bounded telemetry.
Relate object layout, traversal order, working set, cache behavior, false sharing, and measured latency.
Compare system allocator, mimalloc, jemalloc, arenas, and pools using representative workloads and operational constraints.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Allocation Telemetry · changed case · Review Allocation Telemetry
steps.instruction:
